active_concerns: BUG-1 [EDGE-CASE] Low: _parse_created unguarded for non-string created_at — fix: add isinstance(created, str) guard
BUG-2 [AI-DETECTABLE] Low: test_auth_failures_fail_fast(403) missing token-absence assertion — test gap only, source correct
BUG-3 [AI-DETECTABLE] Low: TLS verify test thin — httpx limitation, source correct
Pre-existing: .env.example (3 lines) + no README.md — operator doc gap, outside this change scope
Architect decision pending: shared REPO_PATTERN still accepts '..' segments — only collector-level guard in place

terminology.Collector: S2 component fetching raw items from GitHub via REST; pure I/O, no state/LLM
terminology.Newly-opened issue: issue with created_at within the last lookback_days (UTC)
terminology.Pure I/O boundary: Collector must not touch StateStore (S3) or LLM (S4)
terminology.Secondary rate limit: 403 + X-RateLimit-Remaining:0 — backoff, not a permanent auth failure
terminology.RawItem mapping: item_id=str(number); body null->''; created_at=raw ISO string; url=html_url
terminology.Retry policy: single config object: max_retries=3, backoff_base=1.0, multiplier=2.0, jitter=0.5, ceiling=60.0; Retry-After precedence; 4xx permanent
terminology.Config-driven tunable: max_items_per_repo, page_size, base_url, retry-policy fields — read from config, never hardcoded in the fetch loop (BR-2-013/014)
terminology._classify: single status->{OK,RETRY,SKIP_REPO,FAIL_FAST} classifier; 403 split keys on X-RateLimit-Remaining:0
terminology._parse_created: Z->+00:00 ISO parse to tz-aware UTC for the cutoff compare only; RawItem.created_at stays raw

priority_reading: _handoff.md — S5->S6 GO reasoning, 3 Low bugs, fragile areas
qa-report.md — full bug list + follow-up recommendations
